Autodesk.Revit.DB Namespace

BuiltInParameter Enumeration

Identifies built-in, non-user-editable parameters available in the Revit model.

Member nameValueDescription
ROOM_NAME-1007xxxThe name of the room. Backs Element.Name for Room elements.
ROOM_NUMBER-1007xxyThe number of the room. Backs Room.Number.
ROOM_AREA-1007xxzThe computed area of the room.
VIEW_NAME-1002xxxThe name of the view.
